Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Deconstruct and Analyze the Log I need to go through each case C001 C002 C003 and list the activities Then I need to identify duplicates within each case and analyze the context Case C001 activities Initiate Request Verify Documents Call Customer Submit Additional Verify Documents Approve Request Duplicates Verify Documents appears twice Context Analysis First Verify Documents Initial check fails leads to call Second Verify Documents Re check after upload leads to approval Case C002 activities Initiate Request Verify Documents Call Customer Adjust Account Call Customer Approve Request Duplicates Call Customer appears twice Context Analysis First Call Customer clarify discrepancy leads to Adjust Second Call Customer confirm adjustments leads to approval Case C003 activities Initiate Request Verify Documents Call Customer Adjust Account Verify Documents Approve Request Duplicates Verify Documents appears twice

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Renaming Idea Verify Documents Initial vs Verify Documents Re verification Or Verify Documents First Pass vs Second Pass Context mentions re checks documents now that ID scan is provided triggered by Initiate Request vs Submit Additional For Call Customer Call Customer Discrepancy Clarification vs Call Customer Confirmation context clarify account discrepancy vs confirm adjustments made For C003 Verify Documents Initial Physical verification vs Re verify after adjustment

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Cross Case Analysis Verify Documents duplicated in C001 and C003 In C001 second after Submit Additional In C003 second after Adjust Account core action re verifying trigger different but Initial vs Re verification captures repetition intent Additional Context supports re checks Re verify So Verify Documents Initial and Verify Documents Re verification robust for both Call Customer duplicated in C002 Clarification and Confirmation C003 Call Customer once recall to return distinct so three types Clarification Confirmation Recall

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Initiate Request consistent once per case different resources online vs walk in no rename needed Approve Request once per case safe Submit Additional once safe Adjust Account in C002 C003 but once per case no intra case duplicate so no rename Prompt Identify activities multiple times within same case so only rename Verify Documents and Call Customer duplicates

Name: Backtracking - IND
Text: For C003 Call Customer not duplicate so strictly no rename but context distinct Recall if rename all instances best practice but prompt constraint multiple times within case safest rename only duplicates leave C003 Call Customer or note optional Decide rename duplicates C003 Call Customer remains Call Customer helps distinguish by resource BranchOfficer vs FrontlineAgent

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Draft the Renaming Strategy Activity Verify Documents Occurrences C001 1st 2nd C003 1st 2nd Context 1 Initial check Agent checks identity Physical verification Context 2 Re check Agent re checks Re verify docs Rename Verify Documents Initial and Verify Documents Re verification Justification Distinguishes first pass from subsequent checks Activity Call Customer Occurrences C002 1st 2nd Context 1 clarify account discrepancy Context 2 confirm adjustments made Rename Call Customer Clarification and Call Customer Confirmation Justification Distinguishes information gathering vs validation

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Construct the Revised Log Map renames C001 Verify Documents Initial then Re verification C002 Call Customer Clarification then Confirmation C003 Verify Documents Initial then Re verification Call Customer no change Review and Refine Check C003 Verify Documents fits Initial physical Re verification after adjustment good C001 fits Initial check re checks good C002 Call fits Clarification confirm good Non duplicates Initiate Approve Adjust Submit no rename needed Result looks solid

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Write the Justification Structure response Analysis of Duplicates Renaming Schema Revised Log Justifications Output format revised event log with renamed activities highlight roles in process flow appending parenthetical descriptors makes log cleaner Final output structure Analysis Recurring Activities Renaming Strategy Revised Event Log Justification Changes matches task
